docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 76317712) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 621 LARCH WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76317712)
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 76317712) AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76474474)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76474474) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 76265374) AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76265374), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P SERVED APR-25-2025, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76265374), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLAZA EAST ASSOCIATES, L.P SERVED APR-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LARONDA
